creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
the oniguruma packes comes in 3 diffrent APIs
	devel/oniguruma (API V2) Ruby 1.6, 1.8

	etoile and ruby 1.9 needs the diffrent API
	devel/oniguruma4 (API V4) Ruby 1.9

	To supply both APIs I request a reprocopy.

	(both libs could be counted to category textproc)

Fix: 

chose one:

a)
	reprocopy of devel/oniguruma to devel/oniguruma4

b)
	reprocopy of devel/oniguruma to texproc/oniguruma2
	reprocopy of devel/oniguruma to texproc/oniguruma4
